Went to Urgent Care this morning because of a lung infection trying to kill me.  No sleep, just jumbled dreams of churning damp earth & the screams of angry ancestors.

Wore a shirt the color of what I was spitting up.

Oddly, the medical furniture already was color coordinated.

#covid #lungbutter
